name: Anglesey Bakestones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 lb flour, 4 oz castor sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
2. Rub 4 oz lard into the dry ingredients until well combined.
3. Beat the egg lightly and add enough milk to achieve a soft rolling consistency.
4. Place spoonfuls of the mixture onto a greased griddle.
5. Cook on medium heat, turning once to ensure even cooking.
